title: Heptapleurum agasthiyamalayanum
taxonomy: Heptapleurum agasthiyamalayanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats region in India. The classification of Heptapleurum agasthiyamalayanum places it in the genus Heptapleurum, which is a group of plants commonly known as the seven-veined palms. Within the Araliaceae family, Heptapleurum agasthiyamalayanum is a member of the subfamily Aralioideae. Further classification at the species level is necessary for a more precise understanding of this plant's relationships.
